scope: Strict hand reference dependency and Main Flow body contact slot validation for hand/contact controls.
review_basis: Visual inspection of the strict-hand source/control reference image.
Mask existence, dimensions, hash, and occupancy validation for Main Flow body contact slot assets.
Workflow node reference inspection for Main Flow nodes 972 and 999-1017.

media_reviewed.notes: Same-scene source was visually inspected as a clothed adult-presenting two-person hand-contact reference. This is not final generated-output hand QA.

checks.name: hand_count_and_identity
checks.notes: Input/control image appears suitable for strict-hand reference dependency, but final generated output was not produced or reviewed in this slice.

checks.name: finger_continuity_and_separation
checks.notes: Requires generated output or high-resolution final candidate review.

checks.name: thumb_and_palm_orientation
checks.notes: Requires generated output or high-resolution final candidate review.

checks.name: wrist_to_hand_connection
checks.notes: Requires generated output or high-resolution final candidate review.

checks.name: per_hand_mask_alignment
checks.notes: character_b_hand_mask.png was filled from same-scene character_b_actor_hand_mask.png and is nonzero, but runtime output alignment is untested.

checks.name: contact_zone_mask_alignment
checks.notes: breast_contact_mask.png was filled from same-scene character_a_receiver_breast_mask.png and is nonzero, but runtime output alignment is untested.

checks.name: pose_depth_normal_occlusion_consistency
checks.notes: Depth/normal/occlusion consistency around the contact zone requires a generated output or Lane 4 runtime validation.

checks.name: collision_and_soft_body_deformation
checks.notes: character_b_body_mask.png remains zero-valued, so full actor-body collision/deformation QA is blocked until Lane 1 supplies semantics or a valid actor body mask source.

limitations: No new generated output was reviewed.
No live ComfyUI runtime validation was performed.
Final strict hand quality cannot be claimed from workflow structure, reference image existence, or mask metadata alone.
next_action: After Lane 1 resolves node 1009 handling and Lane 4 runs a justified runtime validation, perform strict visual review on the generated output and update the hand/contact verdict.
